body:
.pricing-price-change-notification .appContainer{color:#1d252c;font-family:Human BBY Digital,Human BBY Web,Arial,Helvetica,sans-serif;white-space:normal}.pricing-price-change-notification .arrow{border:11px solid transparent;border-bottom-color:#c5cbd5;display:block;height:0;position:absolute;right:10px;top:-22px;width:0}.pricing-price-change-notification .arrow:after{border-color:transparent transparent #fff;border-style:solid;border-width:0 10px 10px;content:" ";display:block;height:0;margin-left:-10px;position:absolute;top:2px;width:0}.pricing-price-change-notification .price-change-notification-debug-container{margin:0 auto;position:relative}.pricing-price-change-notification .price-change-notification-debug-container :empty{display:none}.pricing-price-change-notification .price-change-notification-small-view{background:#fff;border:1px solid #e0e6ef;border-radius:5px;margin:15px;padding:15px;position:relative}.pricing-price-change-notification .price-change-notification-content{color:#1d252c;font-family:Human BBY Digital,Human BBY Web,Arial,Helvetica,sans-serif;width:334px}.pricing-price-change-notification .price-change-notification-content h6{font-size:17px;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:5px}.pricing-price-change-notification .price-change-notification-content h6.heading-small{margin-bottom:0}.pricing-price-change-notification .price-change-notification-content .body-copy__browse--test{font-size:13px;margin-right:28px}.pricing-price-change-notification .price-change-notification-content .body-copy__browse--test .price-change-savings{font-weight:600}.pricing-price-change-notification .price-change-notification-content__more-items{font-size:13px;margin-top:15px}.pricing-price-change-notification .price-change-notification-content__view-cart{font-size:13px;margin-top:8px}.pricing-price-change-notification .price-change-notification-content__view-item{cursor:pointer;font-size:13px;margin-top:8px}.pricing-price-change-notification .price-change-notification-content__image{max-height:75px;max-width:75px}.pricing-price-change-notification .price-change-notification-content__image-small{max-height:48px;max-width:48px}.pricing-price-change-notification .price-change-notification-content__image-container{align-items:center;display:flex;height:75px;justify-content:center;margin-right:25px;width:75px}.pricing-price-change-notification .price-change-notification-content__image-container-small{align-items:center;display:flex;height:48px;justify-content:center;margin-right:25px;width:48px}.pricing-price-change-notification .price-change-notification-content__item-small{margin-top:8px!important}.pricing-price-change-notification .price-change-notification-content__item{display:flex;margin-top:15px}.pricing-price-change-notification .price-change-notification-content__item__dropped-price{display:inline-block;font-size:15px;font-weight:600;margin-right:5px}.pricing-price-change-notification .price-change-notification-content__item__reg-price{font-size:13px;font-weight:400;text-decoration:line-through}.pricing-price-change-notification .price-change-notification-content .browse{cursor:pointer}.pricing-price-change-notification .price-change-notification-content .prvw-deal-expiration-timer{margin-top:8px}.prvw-deal-expiration-timer{font-family:Human BBY Digital,Human Fallback,Arial,Helvetica,sans-serif;font-weight:400}.prvw-deal-expiration-timer .message{align-items:center;color:#55555a;display:flex;font-size:11px;font-style:italic;letter-spacing:.2px}.prvw-deal-expiration-timer .message .deal-clock-icon{background:url("data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg width='14' height='14' fill='none' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cpath d='M1.75 7A5.256 5.256 0 0 1 7 1.75 5.256 5.256 0 0 1 12.25 7 5.256 5.256 0 0 1 7 12.25 5.256 5.256 0 0 1 1.75 7ZM.875 7A6.132 6.132 0 0 0 7 13.125 6.132 6.132 0 0 0 13.125 7 6.132 6.132 0 0 0 7 .875 6.132 6.132 0 0 0 .875 7Zm8.15 2.643a.434.434 0 0 0 .617 0 .437.437 0 0 0 0-.619L7.438 6.82V3.063a.438.438 0 0 0-.875 0V7c0 .116.046.228.128.31l2.333 2.333Z' fill='%2355555A'/%3E%3C/svg%3E") no-repeat 50%;background-size:contain;display:inline-block;height:14px;margin-right:3px;vertical-align:bottom;width:14px}.prvw-deal-expiration-timer .message--red{color:#bb0628}.prvw-deal-expiration-timer .message--red .deal-clock-icon{background:url("data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg width='14' height='14' fill='none' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cpath d='M1.75 7A5.256 5.256 0 0 1 7 50%}.prvw-deal-expiration-timer .message--promo-red{color:#e81e25}.prvw-deal-expiration-timer .message--promo-red .deal-clock-icon{background:url("data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg width='14' .116.046.228.128.31l2.333 2.333Z' fill='%23E81E25'/%3E%3C/svg%3E") no-repeat 50%}
